content.Text:
[Mon 2026-04-20 07:06 PDT] Create a new file `attack-predictor.html` for the gif-captcha project. This is a standalone interactive HTML page (no build step needed) that implements an **Attack Pattern Predictor** — a Markov chain-based attack forecasting dashboard.

## Design
- Use the shared CSS: `<link rel="stylesheet" href="shared.css">` and `<script src="shared.js"></script>`
- Dark theme matching the project (GitHub-dark style with CSS vars: --bg: #0d1117, --surface: #161b22, --accent: #58a6ff, etc.)
- Fully self-contained — all JS inline, no external dependencies

## Features

### 1. Attack Sequence Simulator
- Simulated historical attack log with 8+ attack types: credential stuffing, replay attacks, OCR bots, headless browser, CAPTCHA farms, token manipulation, timing attacks, fingerprint spoofing
- Each attack has properties: type, timestamp, severity (1-5), success (bool), source_region, technique_variant
- Generate 200+ realistic historical events on page load

### 2. Markov Chain Transition Model
- Build a transition matrix from the attack sequence (which attack type tends to follow which)
- Display the transition matrix as a color-coded heatmap table
- Allow clicking a cell to see the exact probability and example sequences

### 3. Forecast Panel
- Given the last N attacks, predict the next 5 most likely attack types with probabilities
- Show a "Threat Timeline" — Canvas-rendered horizontal timeline showing predicted attack sequence for next 24 hours
- Confidence intervals that decay over time (wider bands for further predictions)

### 4. Proactive Defense Recommendations
- For each predicted attack type, show specific countermeasures
- Auto-generate a "Defense Posture" configuration (JSON) optimized for the predicted threat landscape
- Risk score (0-100) with animated gauge
- "Deploy Defenses" button that simulates activating countermeasures and shows projected risk reduction

### 5. Live Attack Feed Mode
- Toggle a live simulation that generates new attacks every 2-3 seconds
- Markov model updates in real-time as new attacks arrive
- Predictions shift dynamically
- Alert banner when a predicted attack actually occurs ("Prediction confirmed!")

### 6. Pattern Analysis
- Detect recurring attack cycles (e.g., "credential stuffing → timing attack → OCR bot" chains)
- Show top 5 most common attack chains with frequency
- Seasonal patterns: show attack frequency by hour-of-day as a mini bar chart

## Layout
- Header with title "Attack Pattern Predictor" and subtitle "Markov Chain Threat Forecasting"
- Top row: Risk gauge (Canvas arc) | Live feed toggle | Stats cards (total attacks, prediction accuracy, avg severity)
- Middle: Transition matrix heatmap (left) | Forecast panel with timeline (right)
- Bottom: Pattern analysis section | Defense recommendations

## Navigation
Add a back link to index.html in the header area.

## Quality
- All interactive, all client-side
- Smooth animations and transitions
- Responsive layout
- Clean, professional code with comments

After creating the file, also update `index.html` to add a link to `attack-predictor.html` in the appropriate section/navigation. Look at how other pages are linked and follow the same pattern.

## Verification
Run `node -c shared.js` to verify shared.js syntax is fine (don't modify it, just check it exists).
